presets.label: Consensus Holdings
presets.description: Securities held by two or more tracked funds.

presets.label: Cheap Conviction
presets.description: Tracked names trading under 20x P/E that funds hold with high conviction.

presets.label: High Upside
presets.description: Tracked names with 20%+ upside to analyst target.

presets.label: Big Stake Increases
presets.description: Positions a fund increased by 25%+ quarter over quarter.

presets.label: Bearish Bets
presets.description: Securities where funds hold meaningful put (bearish) exposure.
